title: Fiery Smoked Australian Lamb Skewers
description: Tender lamb skewers infused with the resinous flavor of mitsuba and the deep heat of smoked chili peppers, served sizzling on a hot stone plate
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat and prepare the hot stone plate by heating it over the flames
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and toss to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, add the diced smoked chili peppers to the skewers
Transfer the skewers to the hot stone plate and top with chopped mitsuba
Serve immediately and enjoy the sizzling sounds and aromas
